summary: Tested DELETE /api/sales/{sale_id} endpoint and frontend SalesPage delete functionality. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend delete buttons verified working - both individual row delete and bulk delete options present and functional.
passed_tests: Backend: DELETE /api/sales/{sale_id} endpoint exists and returns 404 for non-existent sale
Backend: DELETE successfully removes sale and returns cleanup details (GST ledger, stock movements, inventory transactions)
Backend: DELETE returns 404 for non-existent sale ID
Backend: DELETE requires authentication (returns 401/403 without token)
Backend: Inventory is restored when sale is deleted
Backend: GST ledger entries are deleted with sale
Backend: Stock movements and inventory transactions are cleaned up
Backend: Bulk delete (multiple sequential deletes) works correctly
Backend: Deleted sale is removed from sales list
Frontend: Sales History page loads with 13 orders
Frontend: Actions dropdown menu has Mark All, Unmark All, Delete Selected options
Frontend: Row action dropdown has View Details, Print Invoice, Download PDF, Cancel Sale, Delete Sale options
Frontend: Delete Sale option visible in red color in row actions dropdown
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: DELETE endpoint properly cleans up all related records (GST ledger, payments, ledger_entries, stock_movements, inventory_transactions, sales_returns)
GOOD: Inventory restoration logic checks if sale was already cancelled before restoring
GOOD: Customer loyalty points are reversed based on total_amount / 100 calculation
GOOD: Voucher usage count is decremented when sale is deleted
GOOD: Frontend SalesPage has both single delete (via row dropdown) and bulk delete (via Actions menu)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing sales data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales delete functionality fully tested. DELETE /api/sales/{sale_id} endpoint is working correctly - cleans up all related records including: sales record, gst_ledger entries, payments, ledger_entries, stock_movements, inventory_transactions, sales_returns, and reverses customer loyalty points and voucher usage. Frontend SalesPage has Delete Sale option in row action dropdown and Delete Selected in Actions menu for bulk operations.

delete_sale_endpoint.description: DELETE /api/sales/{sale_id} deletes sale and all related records

inventory_restoration.description: Inventory quantities are restored when sale is deleted (if not cancelled)

gst_ledger_cleanup.description: GST ledger entries are deleted with sale

stock_movements_cleanup.description: Stock movements and inventory transactions are removed

loyalty_points_reversal.description: Customer loyalty points are reversed if customer_id exists
loyalty_points_reversal.evidence: Code review confirmed logic at line 12894

voucher_usage_reversal.description: Voucher used_count is decremented if voucher_code exists
voucher_usage_reversal.evidence: Code review confirmed logic at lines 12902-12907

frontend_delete_button.description: Delete Sale option visible in row action dropdown on SalesPage
frontend_delete_button.evidence: Playwright test captured screenshot with Delete Sale option in red

bulk_delete.description: Actions menu has Delete Selected option for bulk operations
bulk_delete.evidence: Playwright test verified Actions dropdown with Delete Selected option
